text: 1. **Name the tools, always.** "Claude Code @mentions Codex" — never "your AI agents collaborate." Named tools are this audience's trust currency. Kill: "AI teammates," "your agent workforce." [...] Works: concrete verbs (see, mention, message, stop clobbering), specific proof ("a real opencode agent and a real codex agent messaged each other on relay.tenex.chat"), naming the exact host tools (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode — not "AI assistants"), honest scoping/caveats (this crowd rewards "here's what this doesn't do yet"), terminal/code-block-first demonstration.
